hero.title: About Tabidea
hero.catchLine1: Turn your quiet "I want to go" feeling
hero.descriptionLine1: Tabidea is a travel partner that gently captures the wish behind "I just want to go somewhere,"
hero.descriptionLine2: and shapes it into a journey that truly fits you.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.quote: "Unspoken impulses and sudden discomfort are all signs that your next trip is about to begin."
paragraphs: "I want to go far away." "I want to change my routine."
Behind these vague wishes, there is often a deeper desire you have not yet recognized yourself.
Tabidea carefully listens to those feelings and helps fulfill them through travel experiences.

trinity.title: The 3 Pieces Behind the Name "Tabidea"
trinity.subtitle: Tabidea = Tabi × Idea × Deai

tabi.title: 1. Tabi (Travel)
tabi.bodyLine1: An adventure to cross everyday boundaries and meet new scenery and a new self.

idea.title: 2. Idea
idea.bodyLine1: Through dialogue, we uncover your "travel seeds" that may not yet be fully verbalized.
idea.bodyLine2: AI does not force one-sided answers. It helps translate your intuition into the best plan.

deai.title: 3. Deai (Encounter)
deai.bodyLine1: Vivid serendipity born on top of a carefully designed plan.
deai.bodyLine2: A view that catches your eye or an unexpected conversation can become unforgettable encounters.

trinity.valueStatement: Tabidea's value is not only designing the trip itself, but also designing the encounters along the way.

features.title: What We Provide Today

plan.title: Plan creation and adjustment
plan.body: Generate plans from your conditions, then refine them with regeneration and chat-based adjustments.

save.title: Save, share, and export
save.body: Logged-in users can save plans and share them as travel journals. PDF export and calendar integration are supported.

info.title: Travel information
info.body: Check safety, climate, visa, etiquette, and more by category. Available quotas and categories differ by plan.

pricing.title: Pricing plans
pricing.bodyPrefix: We offer Free, Pro, Premium, and ticket packs. For the latest limits and prices, see the

features.disclaimer: AI-generated suggestions may include errors. Always verify critical details such as business hours, prices, and regulations with official primary sources.

domain.title: Meaning Behind the Domain "tabide.ai"
domain.name: tabide.ai
domain.meaningSuffix: are layered together in one name.
bullets: That you can find something that supports your true self while traveling.
That you can encounter places you truly come to love while traveling.
domain.closing: AI is not the main character. We want it to be a mirror that reflects and gently supports your heart.

vision.title: Vision for the Future
vision.bodyLine1: The protagonist of every trip is always you.
vision.bodyLine2: Tabidea aims to be a partner that understands your subtle feelings and keeps drawing moments of serendipity and encounters with you.
vision.quoteLine1: "What kind of scenery is sleeping in your heart?"
vision.quoteLine2: "Let's begin your best trip from that feeling you cannot yet put into words."

missionCard.title: Mission (Daily role)
missionCard.catch: Reduce travel friction and maximize the color of imagination.
missionCard.body: We use technology to solve tedious work and expand the essential joy of planning and travel.

visionCard.title: Vision (World we want)
visionCard.catch: A world where every traveler finds their own right answer.
visionCard.body: Not one-size-fits-all plans, but journeys users can choose, edit, and truly feel satisfied with.

user.title: User in the Driver's Seat
user.subtitle: The traveler is always the lead
user.body: Technology suggests, users decide. We support creative planning without taking away the fun.

safety.title: Safety as a Baseline
safety.subtitle: Safety is the foundation of adventure
safety.body: We connect reliable information seamlessly. Only when safety is secured can people truly enjoy travel.

story.title: Share the Story
story.subtitle: Weaving stories
story.body: Travel does not end when you return. We create ways for experiences to remain and connect to others.

culture.title: Culture
culture.bodyLine1: We keep being our own strongest heavy users.
culture.bodyLine2: We pursue UX deeply while balancing playfulness and reliability.

notice.title: ⚠️ Important Notice
notice.lead: Tabidea suggestions are AI-generated drafts. Please note the following in real travel:
bullets: Always confirm latest opening hours, prices, and transit details on official websites
AI may sometimes generate inaccurate information (hallucination)
Use suggestions as references and make final decisions by yourself

cta.title: Start Planning Your Journey
cta.lead: Build your own travel story together with AI.
